title: ServerMobs API
body:
## Server-side Mob API
Develop fully functional mobs for a server, completely compatible with vanilla clients.

Were you looking for some content? Check out [ServerMobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/server_mobs)

Note: I ported Polypack Host to 1.19 for use with this mod. Download it [here](https://github.com/techno-sam/polypack-host/releases/tag/v0.2.1) - ***Note**: It is better to use polypack-autohost, which is now part of polymer.*
